ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in the store */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with this inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is available */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The minimum stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to be ordered when the stock level reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the inventory record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* The dimensions of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* The full address of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* The opening hours of the store */,
  "total_floor_space" REAL /* The total floor space available in the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* The full address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the supplier */,
  "credit_terms" TEXT /* The credit terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, inventory staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold during the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* The total amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment used (e.g., cash, credit card, debit card) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who processed the transaction */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the transaction was cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
